$comment: Tool manifest. Each entry describes one tool. The launcher uses this to render the panel's tool tiles.

tools.name: Disable Legacy IPv6 Tunnels
tools.description: Initial hardening: disables Teredo, 6to4 and ISATAP. Includes exportable technical log.

tools.name: Parts Upgrade Advisor
tools.description: Analyzes RAM, CPU (socket/BGA) and storage (NVMe/SATA/M.2). Buying recommendations and warnings.

tools.name: Full System Report
tools.description: Comprehensive HTML report: system, hardware, CPU, RAM, storage, network, battery, BSOD and Upgrade Advisor.

tools.name: Event Log Analyzer
tools.description: Reads Event Viewer and interprets errors: reboots, hardware (WHEA/disk), crashes, drivers, security. Exports HTML.

tools.name: Deep Clean & Repair
tools.description: Full maintenance suite: Defender, cleanup, DISM/SFC, system repair, final report.

tools.name: Bulk App Installer (winget)
tools.description: Install software in bulk via winget. Curated catalog by category, JSON profiles per client, built-in winget search, and a Cleanup section (clear temp files).

tools.name: Install/Update PowerShell 7
tools.description: Installs or updates PowerShell 7 (modern runtime). Better encoding, modern enums and fewer bugs than Windows PowerShell 5.1.

tools.name: Windows Tweaks
tools.description: Wallpaper via Win32 API, dark theme, accent color, taskbar tweaks and watermark.

tools.name: Service Optimizer
tools.description: Stops and sets to Manual non-essential services: telemetry, Xbox, sensors, fax, etc.

tools.name: FastCopy
tools.description: Multi-source copy with profiles, comparison, MD5 and exportable summary. Replaces Robocopy with better UX.

tools.name: Build Offline USB
tools.description: Copies the panel and its dependencies to a USB drive for offline use. Auto-updates launcher when connected to the internet.

tools.name: Robocopy Mirror
tools.description: Optimized robocopy-based copy: mirror mode, retries, centralized logging.

tools.name: DNS Switcher
tools.description: Switches DNS server between profiles (Cloudflare, Google, OpenDNS, custom) with one click.

tools.name: Hosts File Editor
tools.description: Windows HOSTS file editor with automatic backup.

tools.name: Router Security Audit
tools.description: Local network router scan and security audit.

tools.name: BitLocker Manager
tools.description: BitLocker status, activation, suspension and recovery key export.

tools.name: Local Account Hardening
tools.description: Audit and apply principle-of-least-privilege to local user accounts.

tools.name: Extract Product Keys
tools.description: Extract Windows and Office product keys (read-only, safe).

tools.name: PC Handover Report
tools.description: Closeout protocol: final cleanup, summary, log and client handover preparation.
